title: I know that my Redeemer lives
firstLine: I know that my Redeemer lives
publicDomainBasis: Charles Wesley (1707–1788), George Frederick Handel (1685–1759). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
I know that my Redeemer lives
And ever prays for me;
A token of His love He gives,
A pledge of liberty.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I know that my Redeemer lives,
A quick’ning Spirit He;
I know eternal life He gives—
Amazing grace—to me.

sections.label: Verse 3
Verse 4
sections.text:
He wills that I should holy be:
What can withstand His will?
The counsel of His grace in me
He surely shall fulfill.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Jesus, I hang upon Thy word:
I steadfastly believe
Thou wilt return and claim me, Lord,
And to Thyself receive.
